from source import hanoi

def test_hanoi_single_disk_moves_correctly():
    # The single-peg move should be from start to end directly
    expected_moves = [(1, 3)]
    actual_moves = hanoi(1, start=1, end=3)
    assert actual_moves == expected_moves, "Single disk move was incorrect, expected (1, 3) but got {}".format(actual_moves)
